case_title: PROPERTY OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION; $ 3,001.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,001.00; $94.00 U.S. CURRENCHY BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY MICHAEL GAINES ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANTS ALYSSA HARRISON AND CHARDAY SAUNTA STEPHENS. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
